articles.title: Samsung will launch its new wide foldable on July 22nd
articles.description: Samsung has announced that its next Galaxy Unpacked launch event will be held on July 22nd, with the tagline: "A new shape unfolds." It's long been rumored that Samsung is about to expand its foldable phone line to a third format, with a shorter and wider version of its big book-style foldables, to match Huawei's […]
articles.author: Dominic Preston
